problem id: 9d4f1368
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  11110101 -> 10101110
  11001100 -> 00000000
  11111100 -> 10000111
  01000100 -> 00000000
  11010110 -> 10010010
  01100111 -> 00101000
  01001101 -> 00101000
  00101010 -> 01000001
  00000101 -> 00100000

query: 00101100
predicted answer: 00000001
